description: Per-factor attribution for top-10 finishers. One entry per completed event. Auto-appended each week by Mnemosyne.

queued_backfill.note: Historical BBI output files from prior 2026 events don't preserve per-player factor decomposition. Backfill requires replaying the engine against preserved DG inputs. Forward-run events (Week 12 onward) will populate automatically via the PROMETHEUS weekly hook.

metadata.description: Per-factor attribution for top-10 finishers in Week 11 RBC Heritage. Shows how each of the 10 BBI factors contributed to final composite scores.
